title: Discovery Intake — Q3 Automation Project
objectives: Automate invoice processing for 12 regional plants
Reduce manual data entry by at least 60%
Integrate with existing SAP instance by Q4
requirements: Support PDF and EDI invoice formats
Role-based approval workflow with audit trail
Export to existing data warehouse nightly
constraints: Budget capped at $450K for phase one
Go-live must not disrupt month-end close in September
All data must remain in US-East region
next_steps: Schedule technical deep-dive with IT security
Share sample invoices and approval matrix
